AI 插入引用到指定 TeX: AI insert citations into selected TeX
Bib 已写入。打开 TeX 文件后可插入引用。: Bib written. Open a TeX file to insert citations.
Chat 模式仅对话，不会改动文件。: Chat mode is read-only and won't modify files.
Direct: 单轮生成 · Tools: 多轮工具调用/多文件修改: Direct: single-turn · Tools: multi-step tools / multi-file edits
Find claims that likely need citations a: Find claims that likely need citations and list them.
If a Related Work section exists, add th: If a Related Work section exists, add the citations there.
Insert citations into the target TeX fil: Insert citations into the target TeX file.
Keep edits minimal and preserve formatti: Keep edits minimal and preserve formatting.
LLM 输出 JSON 解析失败。: Failed to parse LLM JSON output.
LLM 输出无法解析为 JSON。: LLM output is not valid JSON.
Label: Label
Otherwise add a Related Work subsection: Otherwise add a Related Work subsection near the end and cite the papers.
Return JSON ONLY in this schema:: Return JSON ONLY in this schema:
Search arXiv and return 3-5 relevant pap: Search arXiv and return 3-5 relevant papers with BibTeX entries.
Search arXiv and return 3-5 relevant papers with BibTeX entries. User query: {{query}}
Search arXiv for the user query.
Split the query into 2-4 targeted search: Split the query into 2-4 targeted search queries. Return JSON only: {"queries":["..."]}.
Summarize compile log errors and suggest: Summarize compile log errors and suggested fixes.
Translate all .tex files in the project: Translate all .tex files in the project to {{target}}. Preserve LaTeX commands and structure.{{note}}
Translate the current file to {{target}}: Translate the current file to {{target}}. Preserve LaTeX commands and structure.{{note}}
Translate the selected text to {{target}: Translate the selected text to {{target}}. Preserve LaTeX commands and structure.{{note}}
You are a search assistant. Use the prov: You are a search assistant. Use the provider search. Return JSON only: {"results":[{"title":"","summary":"","url":"","bibtex":""}]}.
You are a LaTeX writing assistant.
Read all .tex files in the project (star: Read all .tex files in the project (start from the main file and any included sections). Use list_files and read_file tools to inspect content. Write a detailed reviewer-style report. Include: Summary, Strengths, Weaknesses, Questions, Missing Experiments, Writing/Clarity, Suggestions, Score (1-10), and Confidence. Output report text only; do not propose patches or code.
Continue after <CURSOR> with a coherent: Continue after <CURSOR> with a coherent next block (1-2 paragraphs or a full environment).
Return only the continuation text, no co: Return only the continuation text, no commentary.
阅读项目并输出完整审稿意见: Read the project and produce a full reviewer report
仅用于“检索/websearch”任务，留空则复用 LLM Endpoint。: Only for search/websearch tasks; empty means use LLM Endpoint.
仅用于图像识别，留空则复用 LLM Endpoint。: Only for vision; empty means use LLM Endpoint.
你是论文检索助手。请为每篇论文写一条简短总结（1-2 句）。返回 JSON：{\: You are a paper search assistant. Write a 1-2 sentence summary for each paper. Return JSON: {"summaries":[{"id":"","summary":""}]}.
例如：使用折线图，突出 Method A；加上 legend；设置 y 轴为 A: e.g. use a line chart, highlight Method A, add legend, set y-axis to Accuracy
例如：只输出 tabular，不要表格标题: e.g. output tabular only, no table caption
例如：润色这个段落，使其更符合 ACL 风格。: e.g. polish this paragraph to match ACL style
确定要删除 \"{name}\" 吗？此操作不可恢复。: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
删除项目 {{name}}？此操作不可撤销。: Delete project {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
只输出 algorithm/algorithmic 环境，不要包含文档结构。: Only output algorithm/algorithmic environment, no document wrapper.
只输出 equation 环境，不要包含文档结构。: Only output equation environment, no document wrapper.
只输出表格的 LaTeX（tabular 或 table），不要包含文档结构。: Only output LaTeX table (tabular/table), no document wrapper.
基于编译日志诊断并修复错误，给出可应用的 diff。: Diagnose and fix compile errors based on the log; return applicable diffs.
已生成引用插入建议，请在 Diff 面板应用。: Citation insert suggestion generated. Apply in Diff panel.
快捷键: Option/Alt + / 或 Cmd/Ctrl + Space 补: Shortcuts: Option/Alt + / or Cmd/Ctrl + Space (complete); Cmd/Ctrl + / (comment); Cmd/Ctrl + F (search); Cmd/Ctrl + S (save)
打开 .tex 文件以显示 Outline。: Open a .tex file to show outline.
拖拽文件：同级排序 / 跨文件夹移动: Drag files: reorder / move across folders
未选择引用插入文件。: No target file selected for citation insert.
未配置 API Key 时将使用后端环境变量。: If API Key is empty, backend env vars will be used.
项目和模板受到服务器鉴权保护。请输入管理员提供的访问令牌后即可加载，令牌只保存在: Projects and templates are protected by server authentication. Enter the administrator-provided access token to load them; it is stored only in this browser tab.
当前浏览器标签页保存的服务器访问令牌无效。请重新输入管理员提供的令牌。: The server access token stored in this browser tab is invalid. Enter the token provided by the administrator again.
服务器令牌只用于访问本服务；模型配置是可选的，不配置模型也可以手动编辑和保存论文: The server token only unlocks this service. Model setup is optional; you can edit and save papers manually without a model.
点击选择、拖拽或粘贴图片: Click, drag, or paste an image
请先创建 Bib 文件。: Please create a Bib file first.
请在编辑器中选择一个 LaTeX 表格 (tabular)。: Select a LaTeX table (tabular) in the editor.
请根据提供论文生成 3-5 句中文综合总结（不要分条）。可以使用 \\cite{: Generate a 3-5 sentence overall summary. You may use \cite{...}. Return only the text.
请输入 arXiv URL 或 ID。: Enter an arXiv URL or ID.
输入任务描述，生成修改建议。: Describe the task to generate suggestions.
输入问题，进行只读对话。: Ask a question for read-only chat.
landing.badge: Local-first · Open Source · AI-Powered Academic Writing
landing.subtitle: A local-first LaTeX + AI workspace for academic writing. Integrated LaTeX editor, AI assistant, template system, and smart review — all running on your machine.
landing.ctaDesc: No sign-up, no uploads — all data stays on your device.
landing.footerTagline: Open-source academic writing tool, runs locally
landing.feat.assistant.name: AI Assistant
landing.feat.assistant.desc: Three modes: Chat, Agent, and Tools. Supports polish, rewrite, translation, autocomplete with multi-step tool execution.
landing.feat.editor.name: LaTeX Editor
landing.feat.editor.desc: CodeMirror 6 with Source/Split/Rendered modes. Real-time PDF preview and one-click compilation.
landing.feat.templates.name: Template System
landing.feat.templates.desc: Built-in ACL/CVPR/NeurIPS/ICML templates. One-click template switching with content preserved.
landing.feat.search.name: Paper Search & Citations
landing.feat.search.desc: Integrated arXiv search and CrossRef lookup. Auto-generate BibTeX entries and smart citation insertion.
landing.feat.charts.name: Charts & Recognition
landing.feat.charts.desc: Generate line/bar/heatmap charts from LaTeX tables. Smart formula and chart recognition.
landing.feat.review.name: Quality Review
landing.feat.review.desc: AI-assisted checks for terminology consistency, missing citations, and compile errors with detailed review reports.
确定永久删除项目 {{name}}？此操作不可撤销。: Permanently delete project {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
确定清空回收站？所有项目将被永久删除。: Empty trash? All projects will be permanently deleted.
选择模板快速开始您的项目: Choose a template to start your project
协作暂不支持该文件类型。: Collaboration doesn't support this file type yet.
Ask a literature question or paste a cla: Ask a literature question or paste a claim...
Documents are indexed automatically when: Documents are indexed automatically when they are added, uploaded, or deleted.
Transparent token-overlap search; not se: Transparent token-overlap search; not semantic vector retrieval.
index-missing: The RAG index does not exist yet.
index-corrupt: The RAG index is corrupt. Use repair / rebuild after checking the source documents.
index-metadata-incomplete: The index metadata is incomplete. Rebuild it to attach generation and fingerprint provenance.
document-parse-failed: One or more documents failed to parse. Open per-file diagnostics for details.
document-zero-chunks: One or more documents produced no searchable chunks.
index-empty: The index contains no searchable chunks.
Server access token protects this Paper: Server access token protects this Paper Writer server; it is not a model API key.
Model setup is optional; even without a: Model setup is optional; even without a model, you can open projects, edit files, and save changes manually.
A server access token is applied for thi: A server access token is applied for this browser tab.
Enter the server token supplied by the a: Enter the server token supplied by the administrator, then apply it.
This server currently reports that authe: This server currently reports that authentication is optional.
HTTP providers need an API endpoint and: HTTP providers need an API endpoint and credential. CLI providers use a server-installed, already signed-in executable.
The server must have this CLI installed: The server must have this CLI installed and signed in. Browser API keys are not used for CLI providers.
The model API key is separate from the s: The model API key is separate from the server access token and is only used for the selected HTTP provider.
CLI providers are read-only Chat provide: CLI providers are read-only Chat providers here; file-changing tasks require the separate reviewable Task Agent workflow.
Run Test connection to verify installati: Run Test connection to verify installation, authentication, and provider reachability. The test may contact the selected provider.
Optional unless server authentication is: Optional unless server authentication is enabled
Stored only for this browser tab session: Stored only for this browser tab session; never written to localStorage.
Leave blank to keep existing key: Leave blank to keep existing key
This CLI does not provide a stable model: This CLI does not provide a stable model list; enter one manually or leave blank.
Server access was cleared. Apply a valid: Server access was cleared. Apply a valid token to load protected projects.
Draw.io editor did not become ready. Che: Draw.io editor did not become ready. Check the configured embed service or use the offline XML source.
The external editor may receive diagram: The external editor may receive diagram content. Configure a trusted self-hosted embed URL for restricted environments.
First load may take a few seconds: First load may take a few seconds
Drag & drop or click to upload: Drag & drop or click to upload
Drop here to move to project root: Drop here to move to project root
No external results. Check each source s: No external results. Check each source status to distinguish no matches from service failure.
File operations are only available for m: File operations are only available for managed projects.
Name: Name

Paper RAG is available for managed paper: Paper RAG is available for managed paper projects.

sec/intro.tex or any project file path: sec/intro.tex or any project file path
Read-only diagnostics. Refresh does not: Read-only diagnostics. Refresh does not install software, sign in, or call a model.
Apply a server access token in Provider: Apply a server access token in Provider settings to run protected diagnostics.
All cited keys found in .bib file: All cited keys found in .bib file

References, packages, fonts, layout, and: References, packages, fonts, layout, and figures are authoritative only in the compiled PDF.

e.g., Change the background color to lig: e.g., Change the background color to light blue, make the arrows thicker, add a title at the top...
in the repository .env, then restart the: in the repository .env, then restart the backend.
useful for editing structure, but not th: useful for editing structure, but not the final typeset result. Use Final PDF to verify references, packages, fonts, layout, and figures.

确认将目录 {{directory}} 注册为项目“{{name}}”？注册只会: Confirm registering directory {{directory}} as project “{{name}}”? Registration only writes project.json and will not move or delete paper files.
已注册项目“{{name}}”，原目录保持不变。: Registered project “{{name}}”; the original directory remains unchanged.
这些目录包含论文文件，但还没有 project.json。确认注册后系统会生成稳: These directories contain paper files but do not have project.json yet. After confirmation, the system generates a stable project ID; the original directory and paper files are not moved.
Task Agent requires a managed Paper Writ: Task Agent requires a managed Paper Writer project.
The CLI edits an isolated snapshot. Your: The CLI edits an isolated snapshot. Your project changes only after you review every file and accept the task. Chat remains read-only.
Describe the exact paper changes and evi: Describe the exact paper changes and evidence constraints.
Binary file changed; review the file met: Binary file changed; review the file metadata before accepting.
I reviewed every changed file and unders: I reviewed every changed file and understand that Accept will modify the original project.
